title: U.S. Courts — Pending Rules and Forms Amendments
description: Judiciary-wide status page for pending amendments to the Federal Rules of Civil, Criminal, Appellate, Bankruptcy, and Evidence procedure — the rules that govern every federal case in the District of Maine and the First Circuit. Prose/link page with no repeating dated list, monitored by full-page fingerprint so amendment postings surface as change items.

items.title: Page updated: U.S. Courts — Pending Rules and Forms Amendments
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
